word: H2179 - זָנַב - zânab - zaw-nab' - Smite the hindmost

sections.paragraph:
Original: זנב

Transliteration: zânab

Phonetic: zaw-nab'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cut off
    1. (Piel) to attack the rear, smite the tail

Origin: a primitive root meaning to wag; used only as a denominative from H2180

TWOT entry: 562

Part(s) of speech: Verb
